title: Governor Walker Forms Working Group to Resolve a Decades Long Battle and Right a Wrong in Gulkana
summary: The State of Alaska, Ahtna, Inc. and Gulkana Village Council work to return villagers’ sacred burial grounds Glennallen, Alaska – Representatives from Governor Bill Walker’s administration are meeting with Ahtna, Inc. and the Gulkana Village Council to explore a path forward to return the villagers’...
